chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 952 of 2025 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 953 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 13.01.2026 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present for the applicant in these matters. So was the case on the earlier dates. Both the matters stand dismissed for non- prosecution. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E Abdul Basit
